name: Trojan Witness (cross-topic reputation laundering)
novelty: Reputation in Beta(alpha,beta) is GLOBAL, never topic-scoped; clean history earned on uncontested truths is fungible and can be spent on a single unrelated lie.

construction.sources: 2 sources S_dom (single DOMAIN anchor, rep_cap 0.60) and S_hw (single HARDWARE anchor, rep_cap 0.65) -- genuinely distinct, genuinely costly anchors purchased honestly ('priced not prevented'). Distinct independence classes, so the engine treats their mutual agreement as REAL corroboration, not echo.
construction.warmup: For ~180 simulated days, S_dom and S_hw co-assert 150+ TRUE, trivially-verifiable claims on uncontested (entity,attribute) pairs nobody disputes (e.g. ('ISO-3166','US.capital')='Washington'). Each pair: writeFact(S_dom,...); writeFact(S_hw, same value); ratify across the two distinct classes. Both climb toward rep_cap; with many clean ratifications and beta=0 their LCB settles high (~0.45-0.50). Advance clock in ~weekly steps so decay-on-read never bites (they stay active).
construction.strike: Day 181: pick a HIGH-VALUE contested pair ('AcmeCorp','ceo') whose genuine incumbent is a fresh single-DOMAIN reporter S_truth (rep reads EXACTLY 0). writeFact(S_dom,('AcmeCorp','ceo'),'FALSE_NAME'); writeFact(S_hw, same 'FALSE_NAME'); then adjudicate('AcmeCorp.ceo').
construction.calls: writeFact x300 (warmup) + ratify x150 + time-advance(180d) + writeFact x2 (strike) + adjudicate

expected: BREACHED. At adjudicate the laundered pair reads LCB ~0.46 vs incumbent ~0.05: top>=0.20 (earned gate) and gap>=0.30 (decisive margin) both clear, so the adjudicator AUTO-RESOLVES in-graph and the FALSE value wins LIVE; the true incumbent is DEMOTED. No human ever sees it.
mechanism: The decisive-or-defer gate trusts a globally-earned LCB margin. Trust earned on cheap uncontested truths is indistinguishable, at adjudication time, from trust that should authorize overturning a contested incumbent. The 'earned slowly, lost fast' clawback only fires AFTER an external disown trigger that never arrives.
probes: 'Priced not prevented' (2 real costly anchors) COMPOSED with an undocumented gap: reputation is not scoped to the claim domain, so honest track record is a transferable bearer asset spendable on one lie.

name: Decay-Trough Ambush (dormancy timing attack)
novelty: Weaponizes pure decay-on-read: a DORMANT genuine incumbent reads its 90-day discount IMMEDIATELY at adjudicate time, so an attacker can schedule the contradiction at the incumbent's confidence trough rather than fight it at full strength.

construction.sources: Genuine incumbent S_true: 1 DOMAIN anchor, earned a strong true claim long ago with LCB ~0.50 at peak, then went fully dormant (no re-observation). Attacker pair S_a (DOMAIN) + S_b (PHONE), genuinely distinct, modestly laundered to a kept-FRESH LCB ~0.45 via recent activity.
construction.setup: Day 0: S_true writeFact(('Bridge-7','status')='OPEN') and earns ratifications -> high LCB. Then NO further activity from S_true. Attacker keeps S_a/S_b active with weekly trivial ratifications so their decay clock is reset on every read.
construction.strike: Advance clock to Day ~200. S_true has not been read/re-observed; on the adjudicate read its alpha/beta are decayed against clock() (two+ half-lives) -> its readout collapses to LCB ~0.10. writeFact(S_a,('Bridge-7','status')='CLOSED'); writeFact(S_b, same 'CLOSED'); adjudicate('Bridge-7.status', { highImpact:false }).
construction.calls: writeFact + ratify (S_true, day0) + time-advance(200d) + weekly ratify (attacker kept fresh) + writeFact x2 (strike) + adjudicate

expected: BREACHED on a timed window. Attacker LCB ~0.45 vs decayed incumbent ~0.10: gap ~0.35 >= 0.30 and top >= 0.20 -> DECISIVE auto-resolve, false 'CLOSED' wins. (If the attacker's laundered rep is weaker, the same construction still degrades to DEFER -> denial-of-auto-confirmation: the truth that should have stayed decisively LIVE is forced into the human queue.)
mechanism: Decay is applied to the incumbent's stale state but the attacker resets its own decay clock by staying active. Decay-on-read makes the incumbent's strength a function of WHEN the dispute is filed, and the attacker controls filing time (a re-skin of the first-arrival trap on the time axis).
probes: Documented decay-on-read semantics + 'priced not prevented'. The liability is that dormancy discount is not symmetric in adversarial control: the honest party cannot cheaply keep a settled true fact 'warm', the attacker can keep its lie warm.

name: Anchor Twins (offline class-assignment forgery of the high-impact gate)
novelty: Directly forges the HIGH-IMPACT '>=2 disjoint anchor classes' requirement by getting two correlated anchors of ONE beneficial owner mislabeled as two distinct independence classes -- the one liability the code admits it cannot solve.

construction.sources: Attacker controls two domains registered through a reseller chain and fronted on two different ASNs so the operator/fleet-cap heuristic does NOT collapse them, AND the offline class-assigner records them as classes C1 and C2 (distinct) when they are in truth one operator. Optionally add a HARDWARE anchor on a second device the same operator owns as C3.
construction.setup: The 'twins' mutually ratify each other across C1/C2 -> the engine, believing they are independent, awards REAL alpha mass to both. Modest warmup to lift each LCB above 0.20 and tighten CI.
construction.strike: Target an IRREVERSIBLE (entity,attribute), e.g. ('Estate-42','beneficiary')='ATTACKER'. writeFact from C1 and C2 (and C3) all asserting 'ATTACKER'. adjudicate('Estate-42.beneficiary', { highImpact:true }).

expected: BREACHED, including under the strictest gate. The high-impact gate demands the winner clear >=2 corroborations, a 90-day recency-clean window, AND >=2 disjoint anchor classes -- all three are satisfied by the mislabeled twins (2-3 'disjoint' classes, mutually corroborating, clean window). Max-independent-set counts them as 2-3 witnesses, LCB clears decisive margin -> false beneficiary wins on the path reserved for irreversible decisions.
mechanism: Every independence guarantee bottoms out in the offline class assignment. A single class-assignment error turns the strongest gate (the >=2-disjoint-anchor-classes high-impact requirement) into a checkbox the attacker controls.
probes: Offline class-assignment error -- explicitly enumerated as the standing human-judgment liability the code cannot solve. This attack shows it is not merely a weakening but a full breach of the high-impact path.

name: Confederate Launder (disown taint-closure evasion via clean intermediary)
novelty: Routes the beneficiary's reputation gain THROUGH an unrelated clean ratifier so that when the poisoning source is disowned, neither a DERIVATION edge nor a corroboration EVENT intersects the tainted seed -- the taint closure's reachability test misses the beneficiary entirely.

construction.sources: S_bad (DOMAIN) is the source that will eventually be disowned. S_ben (HARDWARE) is the real beneficiary who co-asserts S_bad's false value. S_clean (PHONE), an unrelated-looking confederate with its own anchor, is used to launder credit.
construction.setup: S_bad and S_ben both writeFact(('Site-9','owner')='FALSE_OWNER') -- crucially WITHOUT a DERIVATION edge between their strands (both filed as independent OBSERVED facts, not derived-from). S_ben's reputation is then lifted by ratify FROM S_clean on a SEPARATE batch of true claims, NOT by corroboration-with-S_bad. So S_ben's recorded alpha-mass events point at S_clean, never at S_bad's seed.
construction.strike: Later, external evidence forces disown(S_bad). downstreamDisownSweep delegates the direct crater, builds the tainted-class set from S_bad's seed roots, and BFS-walks DERIVATION in-edges + scans corroboration events intersecting the seed. S_ben has NO DERIVATION edge to S_bad and NO corroboration event intersecting S_bad's seed (its credit came from S_clean) -> S_ben is never reached.
construction.calls: writeFact x2 (S_bad,S_ben, no DERIVATION edge) + ratify (S_clean->S_ben on unrelated truths) + time-advance + disown(S_bad)

expected: BREACHED (residual after disown). S_bad is cratered and its own strand demoted, but S_ben keeps its laundered reputation and S_ben's copy of 'FALSE_OWNER' survives -- if S_ben's LCB still clears the margin, the false value stays LIVE post-disown. The clawback that should be transitive stops at the reachability boundary.
mechanism: The corroboration-credit reversal is EXACT and bounded precisely to events/edges intersecting the seed -- by design it never punishes coincidental independent agreement. The attacker disguises funded collusion AS coincidental independent agreement by sourcing the credit from a third party.
probes: Disown taint-closure / corroboration-credit-reversal boundary. The 'never punish coincidental independent agreement' safety property is inverted into a laundering channel: indirection through a clean ratifier makes funded poisoning look coincidental.

name: Sandbag the Doorbell (decisive-or-defer deferral flood / human-horn DoS)
novelty: Does not try to WIN; weaponizes the defer branch to manufacture unbounded DEFERs, exhausting the finite human reviewer so the genuine truth is never ratified and the attribute is pinned in unresolved PROVISIONAL superposition -- denial-of-answer at linear cost.

construction.sources: For each targeted high-value (entity,attribute), mint K fresh ~free sources (bare-key / disposable-EMAIL, each a nominally distinct class or class-collapsed -- it does not matter), each asserting a DIFFERENT individually-plausible value. All read LCB ~0 (fresh).
construction.setup: writeFact from each of the K sources with K distinct values about ('Policy-X','rate'). The genuine incumbent S_true is itself low-rep or holds only a single anchor (so on a high-impact attribute it can never satisfy the >=2-disjoint-anchor-classes winner gate).
construction.strike: adjudicate('Policy-X.rate'). No candidate is both decisive (gap>=0.30) and earned (top>=0.20) -> the adjudicator DEFERS and appends a PendingRatification. Repeat across hundreds of attributes and re-drip new fresh values whenever the queue is serviced. listPending grows without bound.
construction.calls: writeFact xK per target x many targets + adjudicate (each -> DEFER) + re-drip loop

expected: DEFENDED for integrity (no false value ever WINS in-graph -- fresh floods correctly fail the earned gate and defer) but BREACHED for AVAILABILITY: the human horn is a finite serial resource, the queue is flooded at ~free cost, the genuine truth never gets ratified, and every reader of the attribute gets an unresolved/PROVISIONAL non-answer. Denial-of-resolution.
mechanism: Decisive-or-defer correctly refuses to let headcount win, but it converts every unwinnable dispute into a mandatory human ticket. The attacker cannot poison the VALUE but can poison the QUEUE, and the system has no rate-limit / stake-gate on filing a deferrable contradiction.
probes: The contradiction-set bomb (the hard theorem's attack #1) re-expressed at the adjudication layer: structurally defended against false WINS, undefended against deferral-driven exhaustion of the external human resource. Stake-on-contradict is the documented-but-unbuilt mitigation (FINANCIAL_STAKE binder not implemented).

name: Variance Starvation (LCB confidence-interval gaming)
novelty: Backdoors 'headcount never drives weight' through OBSERVATION count rather than source count: a few real distinct-anchor sources emit a high VOLUME of self-consistent ratified micro-observations to TIGHTEN their Beta CI, lifting LCB above a genuine but LOW-SAMPLE incumbent whose wide CI depresses its LCB below its true mean.

construction.sources: Attacker pair S_a (DOMAIN) + S_b (PHONE), genuinely distinct. Genuine incumbent S_true: 1 DOMAIN anchor, a SMALL number (3-4) of high-quality ratifications -> true mean ~0.50 but wide credible interval -> LCB ~0.25.
construction.setup: S_a and S_b mutually ratify ~500 trivially-true low-value micro-claims, all corroborated, beta=0. alpha+beta sample size becomes large -> the credible interval collapses; even with mean clamped at rep_cap the LCB readout rises to ~0.55 because the lower bound (mean - k*std) tightens toward the mean as n grows.
construction.calls: ratify x~500 (attacker mutual, CI-tightening) + writeFact x2 + adjudicate; vs S_true with only ratify x3

expected: BREACHED. Attacker LCB ~0.55 vs incumbent LCB ~0.25 -> gap ~0.30 at the decisive threshold and top>=0.20 -> AUTO-RESOLVE, false 'FALSE' balance wins, low-sample truth DEMOTED. The incumbent is penalized for being CORRECT-but-quiet (few observations) while the attacker is rewarded for being VOLUMINOUS-but-trivial.
mechanism: LCB = mean - k*std rewards sample size independently of distinct-witness count. rep_cap clamps the MEAN ceiling but not the CI WIDTH, so observation volume from 2 real sources tightens the lower bound and clears the margin against a genuine source that simply spoke less often.
probes: The 'headcount never drives weight' guarantee, evaluated against OBSERVATION volume rather than SOURCE count -- a statistical-readout gap distinct from cross-topic laundering: even an on-topic, honestly-anchored attacker beats a low-sample truth-teller purely by CI tightening.
